name: Peoples Trust And Savings Bank
description_short: Community bank serving the Evansville, Indiana area with checking, savings, mortgages, and business banking. Operates 5 local branches with 40+ ATMs regionally and 4,000+ nationwide access.
description_long: Peoples Trust & Savings Bank is a regional community bank headquartered in Boonville, Indiana, serving the greater Evansville area. The bank operates five physical branch locations across Boonville, Newburgh, and Evansville with extended lobby and drive-up hours. The institution positions itself as a "friendly hometown banking" provider focused on personal relationships and local community support. Peoples Trust & Savings Bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail and commercial banking products. For personal customers, they provide checking and savings accounts, including an Elite Savings account earning 3.00% APY with no caps or long-term lock-up requirements. Their mortgage division, Main Street Mortgage, emphasizes first-time homebuyer accessibility through low down payment options and no private mortgage insurance (PMI) requirements. They also offer conventional mortgages, new construction financing, and a rate refresh program allowing borrowers to refinance within 18 months for a flat $250 fee. Additional services include personal loans, credit cards, CD products, and a mobile banking app for account management. The bank's commercial banking division targets small businesses with customized financing, deposit options, and business loans. What distinguishes Peoples Trust & Savings Bank is their emphasis on first-time homebuyer support through the Main Street Mortgage program, which eliminates PMI and offers flexible down payment structures—a competitive feature for entry-level home purchasers. The Elite Savings account with uncapped APY provides an alternative to traditional term-based CDs. The bank also highlights extensive ATM access (40+ local, 4,000+ nationwide) and same-day debit card issuance, enhancing convenience for customers. Their commercial banking team specializes in small business relationships, positioning themselves as accessible partners rather than large institutional lenders. The bank appears to prioritize customer security with fraud alerts and a dedicated phone line for verification. As a regional community bank, Peoples Trust & Savings Bank operates within a defined geographic footprint and may have limitations for customers outside the Evansville area. While they offer competitive mortgage rates and products, their APR percentages (6.25%-6.97%) reflect current market rates and are not exceptional. The bank's website content is partially incomplete or under development, with placeholder text visible. Digital offerings appear functional but not as sophisticated as larger national banks or fintech competitors. For consumers prioritizing local branch relationships, personalized service, and community banking, this institution is a viable option; however, customers seeking comprehensive digital-only banking or nationwide branch networks should evaluate alternatives. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts with same-day debit card issuance
Savings accounts including Elite Savings with 3.00% APY
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with current rate quotes available
Main Street Mortgage home purchase loans with low down payment and no PMI options
Conventional mortgages (6.25% rate example with 20% down, 30-year fixed)
New construction mortgages (5.75% rate with interest-only payments during build phase)
Mortgage rate refresh/refinance program within 18-month window for $250 flat fee
Personal loans for individual borrowing needs
Business loans and commercial financing with customized terms
Mobile banking app for account management
pros: Main Street Mortgage program offers low down payment options with NO private mortgage insurance (PMI) requirement—a significant cost savings for first-time homebuyers
Elite Savings account earns 3.00% APY with no caps and full liquidity—no long-term lock-up like traditional CDs
Rate refresh program allows mortgage customers to refinance within 18 months for a flat $250 fee if rates decrease
Same-day debit card issuance upon account opening for immediate account access
40+ ATMs in Evansville area plus 4,000+ ATM network nationwide for broad cash access
Five physical branch locations with extended hours (Saturday lobby hours at select branches, drive-ups available most days)
Dedicated commercial banking team and customized business financing options for small businesses
cons: Limited geographic footprint—five branches only serve Evansville/Boonville area; minimal convenience for customers outside region
Current mortgage rates (6.25%-6.97% APR) are competitive but not exceptional compared to larger national lenders or online mortgage platforms
Website appears incomplete with placeholder text and formatting issues, suggesting digital infrastructure may lag behind competitors
No mention of online account opening, digital mortgage application, or advanced fintech features relative to modern banking standards
Smaller institution may have fewer product variations, lower loan limits, or less specialized services compared to regional or national banks
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Evansville area seeking low down payment mortgages without PMI
Small business owners in the Evansville/Boonville region needing personalized commercial banking relationships
Local residents prioritizing in-person branch relationships and community bank service over digital-first banking
Savers seeking high-yield, flexible savings accounts without CD lock-up periods or rate caps
diagnosis: Peoples Trust & Savings Bank is best for customers in the Evansville, Indiana area who value community relationships, personalized service, and local branch access—particularly first-time homebuyers attracted to the Main Street Mortgage program's low down payment and no-PMI features. The main caveat is geographic limitation; the five-branch footprint serves only the Evansville/Boonville region, making this bank impractical for out-of-area customers or those requiring nationwide convenience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
